About Me

A story of
curiosity & code

I'm a Computer Science & Engineering junior at Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Bangalore — passionate about crafting digital experiences that are both beautiful and functional.

With a background spanning frontend development, UI/UX design, and leadership, I bring ideas to life through clean code and thoughtful design. I've led IEEE initiatives, competed in national-level hackathons, and believe technology should serve humanity gracefully.

Raised in Kuwait, schooled across borders — I carry a global perspective into every project I undertake.
